queue.name: ICT component score decomposition

That sub-condition = new Grade A+++ (data-driven, not theory-driven).

queue.last_result: COMPLETE. Component ICs: market_structure=-0.195 (anti-edge, HYP-034 deployed), fvg_tap=-0.056 overall but CONDITIONAL (helpful in UTC 03xx, harmful elsewhere), displacement=+0.068 (only genuine positive signal), kill_zone=0.000 (flat). New finding: displacement=0 predicts losses consistently. Consider veto.

queue.name: HYP-047 Score Cap Study: test score < 9.0 as ICT entry filter
queue.description: HYP-047 confirmed score inversion in forensics. Test: on London A/A+ trades, apply score < 9.0 filter and measure Sharpe improvement. queue.last_result: COMPLETE (REST MODE 2026-05-27). Score cap sweep confirms: score<=8.5 optimal (not 9.0 or 8.0). UTC03 + score<=8.5: WR=60.7%, avgR=+1.295, MC=100%, n=28. TRIPLE filter (UTC03+disp+score<=8.5): WR=72.7%, avgR=+1.670, MC=100%, n=22. KEY FINDING: frequency-quality tradeoff. UTC03 gate limits to 1.1-1.4 trades/month making G2 (30 trades) take 17-27 months. disp>=1.5+score<=8.5 WITHOUT UTC03: 99.8% MC, 4.3/month, 7mo to G2. HYP-048 added for Colin decision.

queue.name: HYP-053: Backtest rate divergence velocity size gate on v014 trade log
queue.description: REST MODE found: 90-day rolling spread velocity (GBPUSD+AUDUSD+USDJPY+AUDNZD) correctly predicts 3/4 bad years. Proposed size gate: velocity > p50 = 1.0x, p25-p50 = 0.5x, < p25 = 0.25x. Backtest: load v014 trade log (n=119 costed OOS trades), apply daily size multiplier from cached rate data, recompute Sharpe and max_DD. Focus on 2021 (expected: large improvement) and 2024 (expected: material improvement). Compare vs v014 baseline Sharpe=0.76. This is a pure size reducer — no trade entries missed. Low implementation risk. Needs rate data loading (parquet files already cached).
queue.result: REJECTED. |vel| size gate reduces portfolio Sharpe at all causal lookbacks (60/90/120d: -0.028/-0.035/-0.030) and even under look-ahead (-0.0096) on canonical v003 log (n=276). Premise 'low-vel=bad year' false (2020/2021 low-vel were GOOD years it throttled). Signed variant = variance-only (maxDD -0.097->-0.039, Sharpe flat). See HYP-053, FIND-REST-015-a/b.
queue.last_result: python3 scripts/rq_rest_011_velocity_gate.py (paths repointed); artifact data/research/rq_rest_011_velocity_size_gate_results.json

[REST-010 update: RQ-REST-014/HYP-060 proves the HYP-058 velocity overlay does NOT address the trailing drag (orthogonal, perm p=0.39) -> this exit re-sim is the ONLY lever that touches the -49R trailing cluster. queue.last_result: REPLICATED OFFLINE 2026-06-25 REST-024 on canonical v015 proof set (411 trades, independent of confirmation log): trailing -60.8R/meanR -0.515/sharpe -0.335; 3-5d cluster = 95% of drag (CI [-1.52,-1.03] excl 0); 11d+ trailing NET +16.2R; every flat-rate year negative, 2024 OOS -14.1R. Time-floor UPPER BOUND +0.11-0.16 book Sharpe (NOT realized -- needs price path). Full re-sim STILL BLOCKED (stooq/yahoo 403 in sandbox). Arm order reaffirmed: (1) 5-6d trailing activation-delay FIRST. Confirmation that the lever is real is now multi-dataset; awaiting network + Colin approval to run the counterfactual. See FIND-REST-024-a/b.
queue.rest_note: REST-019 (2026-06-19): entry-gate alternative to the exit re-sim tested & REJECTED (FIND-REST-019-a) -- no entry-known proxy for the 3-5d whipsaw; Tuesday signal is a confounded EURUSD artifact. Full exit re-sim remains the only lever and is still network-blocked (Yahoo 403). Re-run priority unchanged when network returns; primary arm = trailing-activation-delay 5/6d.

queue.name: Unify HYP-058 signed-velocity defense overlay with HYP-059 exit drag
queue.description: HYP-058 (signed 90d rate-spread velocity) cuts maxDD ~60% by de-sizing flat-rate regimes; HYP-059 shows those same flat regimes are where the trailing stop bleeds. Test whether the signed-velocity defense overlay specifically suppresses the trailing-stop-loss cluster (i.e. does throttling in low-velocity windows preferentially shrink the -0.5R trailing exits?). If yes, the overlay and an exit-rule change are partly redundant; pick the cheaper lever. Forensic-only, no network: join velocity regime tag (cached) to each trade's exit_reason.
queue.last_result: CONFIRMED ORTHOGONAL (HYP-060). Velocity overlay throttles trailing_stop (mean_mult 0.871) and time exits (0.883) equally; perm p=0.39 (null). Trailing drag NOT concentrated in low-velocity windows (77/97 in HIGH full-size bucket). HYP-058 and the exit fix are independent and stack -> RQ-010/RQ-REST-013 remains the non-substitutable lever for the -49R trailing drag. See FIND-REST-014-a/b.

queue.description: Ex-ante gate forensic: test whether any entry-known feature proxies the 3-5d trailing whipsaw cluster on the 318-trade costed 4-pair log. RESULT: NO clean proxy. DOM degenerate (95% month-start), DOW confounded; Tuesday 'edge' is a confounded EURUSD artifact, captures ~40% of drag, nets negative. Confirms HYP-059 (exit-mechanism problem). Artifact data/agent/rq_rest_019_results.json.
queue.result: NEGATIVE_USEFUL — entry-gate shortcut ruled out; reaffirms RQ-REST-013 exit re-sim as the lever.

queue.name: Cost-stress / break-even robustness of the 4-pair edge (offline)
queue.origin: REST-020 / robustness follow-up while RQ-REST-013 exit re-sim stays network-blocked
queue.description: Stress spread cost by multiplier k on the 318-trade costed log; find portfolio/per-pair/per-year break-even and bootstrap significance break-even. Tests whether the thin Sharpe is a cost artifact and whether execution cost is an independent failure mode.
queue.result: CONFIRMED HYP-062. Edge robust: portfolio break-even 12.5x spread (point), 5.6x for 95% significance; spread drags only 8% of gross; carry ~neutral. Cost-fragility maps onto regime-fragility (2018 dies at 1.8x, 2019 at 3.3x; trending years tolerate ~20x). AUDUSD most cost-fragile (6.4x), GBPUSD most robust (23x). Execution cost is NOT the lever; exit re-sim (RQ-REST-013) remains it. Artifact rq_rest_020_cost_stress_results.json.

queue.name: Multiple-testing audit of the hypothesis ledger (offline)

queue.description: Apply Bonferroni + Benjamini-Hochberg FDR across the family of recorded significance tests; determine which CONFIRMED edges survive family-wise correction.
queue.result: DONE. HYP-063 CONFIRMED. Live portfolio + CB-blackout + exit-mech survive BH-FDR(5%); only HYP-059 survives Bonferroni. Flagged HYP-056 (mislabelled) and 4 untested CONFIRMED gates. See FIND-REST-021-a..d.
